title: Drawing Is a Learning Tool, Not Just Art
subtitle: 绘画是学习工具，不仅是艺术

paragraphs.en: We often think of drawing as something that takes inborn talent, but this kind of thinking stems from our misclassification of drawing as primarily an art form rather than a tool for learning. Researchers, teachers, and artists are starting to see how drawing can positively impact a wide variety of skills and disciplines. Most of us have drawn before, but at some point most of us stop.
paragraphs.zh: 我们常认为绘画需要天赋，但这种想法源于我们错误地将绘画主要归类为艺术形式而非学习工具。研究人员、教师和艺术家正开始认识到绘画如何能积极影响各种技能和学科。我们大多数人都曾画过画，但到某个时候大多数人就停了。

paragraphs.en: Some argue that adults abandon drawing because we have given it a very narrow definition. In his book Stick Figures: Drawing as a Human Practice, Professor D. B. Dowd argues we have misfiled the significance of drawing because we see it as a professional skill instead of a personal capacity. We mistakenly think of good drawings as realistic illusions. Rather, drawing should be recategorized as a symbolic tool. Human beings have been drawing for 73,000 years — it is part of what it means to be human.
paragraphs.zh: 有人认为成年人放弃绘画是因为我们赋予了它过于狭隘的定义。D.B.道德教授在《火柴人：绘画作为人类实践》一书中指出，我们错误理解了绘画的意义，因为我们视其为专业技能而非个人能力。我们错误地认为“好”的画就是逼真的幻觉。实际上，绘画应被重新归类为符号工具。人类绘画已有73000年历史——这是人之为人的一部分。

words.meaning: v. 错误归类，归档错误

paragraphs.en: The human hand is an extremely dense network of nerve endings — in many ways, human beings are built to draw. Some researchers argue that doodling activates the brain's default circuit, the areas responsible for maintaining baseline activity. In one study, participants who doodled while listening to names remembered 29 percent more than those who did not.
paragraphs.zh: 人类的手是极其密集的神经末梢网络——从很多方面看，人天生适合绘画。一些研究者认为涂鸦会激活大脑的默认回路，即负责维持基线活动的区域。在一项研究中，听名字时涂鸦的参与者比未涂鸦者多记住了29%的名字。

paragraphs.en: There is also evidence that drawing talent is based on how accurately someone perceives the world. Artists perceive size, shape, color and angles more accurately than non-artists. Rather than think of drawing as a talent some are gifted in, we should consider it a tool for seeing and understanding the world better — one that happens to double as an art form.
paragraphs.zh: 也有证据表明绘画天赋取决于感知世界的准确程度。艺术家对大小、形状、颜色和角度的感知比非艺术家更准确。与其将绘画视为少数人有天赋的才能，不如将其视为更好地观察和理解世界的工具——它恰好兼具艺术形式的功能。
